title: list.delete request

oneOf.description: Action-specific index input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.
Action-specific index input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

index.description: One-based query, cursor, or list position; the action schema defines its exact reference set.

name.description: Saved-object name in this action namespace; do not assume names are shared by cursors, lists, and protocol configs.

signal.description: Final leaf signal path. Aggregate, array, and struct roots are not expanded automatically.

time_unit.description: Interprets only unitless time numbers; it never overrides a time string that already has a unit.

description: Delete a signal or index from a waveform list.
x-purpose: 从信号列表删除信号或 index。
x-how_it_works: 按 name 找 list，再用 signal 或 index 删除条目。
x-arg_contract_notes: required: name; also one of: signal / index
x-description-zh: 从信号列表删除信号或 index。

use_when: 从信号列表删除信号或 index。
do_not_use_when: 不要把本 action 用于 list.add、list.create 的业务目标；请改用列出的同域 action。

alternatives.when: 向信号列表追加一个信号。

constraints: required: name; also one of: signal / index
